note: Times in Mountain Standard Time (MST / UTC-7). Arizona does not observe daylight saving time.

weekday.name: Mellow Mountain Music
weekday.description: Smooth yacht rock, local tunes, and relaxed energy to start the day. CBS, state, and local news plus the local forecast on the hour.

weekday.description: The mellow flow continues through the afternoon. Native America Calling mid-day, with news on the hour.

weekday.name: The World Famous 3 O'Clock Three Pack
weekday.description: Three themed tracks back-to-back, no interruptions — a daily highlight.

weekday.name: Sports & Music Block
weekday.description: Live coverage of the Suns, Cardinals, Diamondbacks, ASU, U of A, and NAU, mixed with evening music and updates.

weekday.name: Coast to Coast AM
weekday.description: Explore the unexplained — UFOs, conspiracies, and ancient mysteries — through the midnight hours.

weekday.name: Overnight Mellow Mountain Music
weekday.description: Late-night chill and midnight classics to ease you into morning.

weekday.name: The Quiet Storm
weekday.description: Two hours of timeless R&B and soul to close out the night.

weekend.name: Mellow Mountain Music
weekend.description: A full day of soft oldies, yacht rock, and mellow music.
